name: f/1.2 (Ultra-shallow)
description: Dreamlike aesthetic with extremely blurry backgrounds, beautiful circular bokeh, and razor-thin focus.

name: f/1.8 (Shallow)
description: Very shallow depth of field, highlighting the main subject while keeping the background softly out of focus.

name: f/2.8 (Cinematic Classic)
description: The sweet spot for cinema, offering clear separation of subject with a gorgeous background blur.

name: f/4.0 (Balanced)
description: Balanced depth of field with moderate background softening and sharp foreground details.

name: f/5.6 (Deep Focus)
description: Sharper throughout, perfect for capturing both the character and their immediate environment in detail.

name: f/8.0 (Panoramic)
description: Deep depth of field, keeping both foreground subjects and distant landscapes exceptionally crisp.

name: f/11 (Maximum Depth)
description: Extreme deep focus, ensuring every element from the lens to the background is completely sharp.
